THE LAW OF MOORE WILL STOP SPECULATION ***  
THE LAW OF MOORE WILL STOP SPECULATION IS A FOLKLORE THAT HAS BEEN DISPROVED BY SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY. IT IS NOT A LAW BUT A MYTH THAT HAS BEEN REJECTED BY THE SCIENTIFIC COMMUNITY. THE LAW OF MOORE PREDICTED THE INCREASE IN PROCESSING POWER OF COMPUTER PROCESSORS AT A RATE OF ABOUT 30% EVERY TWO YEARS. THIS PREDICTION HAS BEEN PROVEN TO BE CORRECT FOR DECADES AND HAS GUIDED THE DEVELOPMENT OF COMPUTER TECHNOLOGY. THE LAW OF MOORE IS NOT A LAW THAT WILL STOP SPECULATION BUT A LAW THAT HAS SHAPED THE FUTURE OF TECHNOLOGY.
